title: Normalize platform vocabulary and config aliases for Atlas-era Sentinel
description: Align Sentinel's config vocabulary with real ecosystem usage by supporting current ios/android naming cleanly while preserving compatibility with older apple/google or flat catalog assumptions.
acceptanceCriteria: Sentinel's accepted platform vocabulary matches current product usage without silent ambiguity
Backward-compatible aliases are explicit and tested rather than accidental
Config docs explain the accepted keys and migration expectations clearly
Products do not need to guess whether Sentinel wants apple/google or ios/android
proofRequirements: config parsing tests cover old and new keys
docs name the compatibility behavior directly

notes.text: Normalized sentinel.yaml platform aliases so ios/android are accepted and preferred while loader canonicalizes them onto the existing internal apple/google model. Updated init scaffolding, docs, example config, and loader tests to cover alias and conflict cases.
